transcript.userMessage: I'm on the "Be Financially Stable" objective (goalId 7). Write up our high-level strategy from what we just agreed and add it to this goal as a note.

cases.expectation: A strategy write-up is a narrative note, not a status statement. After drafting and confirming, the assistant must post it via add-objective-comment (no health, does not move the status badge), NOT add-objective-update — posting a strategy note as a health-bearing update would wrongly flip the Objective's status badge. It must use the page-context goalId (7) and must not invent a different objective.
